final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing promotional poster for cross-border e-commerce sales, designed for social media and advertising platforms, with layered typography and product integration.

Style/medium: commercial poster design with the rhythmic tension of layered typography, balancing complexity with visual breathing room
Composition: 16:9 horizontal format, dynamic layered text arrangement with strategic overlapping and occlusion by product elements, asymmetric energy with centered focal weight
Subject: prominent artistic display typography spelling out promotional messaging, partially obscured by featured product or brand mascot element creating depth
Scene/backdrop: rich commercial environment with subtle gradients and abstract shapes supporting the layered text without competing
Lighting/mood: dramatic directional light creating depth between text layers, the excitement of a limited-time offer held in controlled tension
Color palette: saturated promotional hues with warm accent tones against cooler base, the chromatic energy of commerce tempered by restraint
Materials/textures: polished digital surfaces with subtle dimensional depth, the smooth confidence of premium retail
Text (verbatim): 跨境电商促销 / 限时特惠 / 全球好物 (as artistic stacked typography)
Constraints: 16:9 aspect ratio, layered text must remain partially legible, product occlusion must enhance not destroy readability, complexity without visual chaos
Avoid: unreadable text buried under products, cluttered composition without hierarchy, generic stock-photo aesthetic, Western holiday clichés inappropriate for Chinese cross-border context
